grid.response:
&XMLGetUOMConversion;
if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end exec FastBusiness$Voucher$Receipt$Item @unitCode, @ma_vt, @voucherCode, @@userID, @@admin, @ma_kho return end
declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end if exists(select 1 from dmkho where ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_dvcs = @unitCode&SiteCheck;) begin exec FastBusiness$Voucher$Receipt$Site @unitCode, @ma_vt, @ma_kho return end
&CreateTicket; select @ticket as value return

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt where @@whereClause order by @@orderByClause
